items.name_en: Original leather, comes with picture packaging
items.name_cn:
Original leather, comes with picture packaging
【Premium Hardware, Original Leather】Wander Matelasse Suede Hobo Handbag/Shoulder Bag~Matte Coffee
The Wander handbag is updated seasonally. This mini bag is crafted from Matalasse suede, featuring exquisite craftsmanship and a three-dimensional effect that exudes elegance. With a Hobo silhouette, it blends vintage charm with modern elegance, becoming a new symbol of a modern woman's temperament.
~Gold hardware
~Zipper closure
~Front metal-engraved logo
~Cotton satin lining
Dimensions: W20×H17×D6cm
 :_5BC125

items.name_en: Original Miu Miu 5BB142 New Bowling Bag, a main item on the official website, an absolutely explosive style this year 🔥. Top-grade imported calfskin, Miu's unique Matelasse pattern. The bag is exquisite, three-dimensional, and structured. The front engraved logo echoes the leather color. Removable and adjustable leather long shoulder strap. Cotton satin lining, with zippered pocket. Many celebrities and influencers are wearing this style. Size: 22X10.5X7.5Cm, with original packaging

items.name_en: Original Miu Miu corduroy tote is so dreamy!! So cute
items.name_cn:
Original Miu Miu corduroy tote is so dreamy!! So cute
5BB117: New Miu Miu corduroy tote, a perfect fusion of fashion and classic, exquisite and casual, corduroy fabric paired with calfskin, soft and durable texture, lighter and more versatile than full leather, stunning in both appearance and practicality, three-generation long handle design for shoulder carrying, large size with ample capacity to easily hold various essentials, perfect for work or travel, new canvas lining for a more beautiful and durable look, Dimensions: 34X23X12cm (with original packaging🎁)

items.name_en: Original Order Original Factory Custom Leather ♥️
items.name_cn:
Original Order Original Factory Custom Leather ♥️
PRAD*a Launches New 2021 Spring/Summer Series Hobo Bag, selected calfskin. Created by Diao Juan, Wenqi, and Dunxi. A new interpretation of the original version. Lightweight and fashionable, a must-have for trendsetters. Prada was founded in Milan, Italy in 1913 by Miuccia Prada. Miuccia Prada's unique talent lies in her unremitting pursuit of new creativity, blending intellectual curiosity and cultural interests to pave the way for pioneers. She not only predicts fashion trends but also leads fashion trends
Size: 27cm Model 123

items.name_en: Original: Burberry [Model: 6151] ❤️ A feminine tote bag made from selected soft and durable full-grain leather, paired with British worsted House tartan pieces, crafted by an Italian workshop. The clean and exquisite size design features multiple slip pockets and zip pockets. A gold metal base provides protection. This item comes with an adjustable handle or a detachable narrow strap, suitable for hand-carrying or crossbody wear. Dimensions: 26 x 12 x 21cm
items.name_cn: Original: Burberry [Model: 6151] ❤️ A feminine tote bag made from selected soft and durable full-grain leather, paired with British worsted House tartan pieces, crafted by an Italian workshop.
